description: Check auto-update status on session start (read-only)

hooks.command: result=$(bash ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/debo-update-check 2>/dev/null || echo AUTO_UPDATE_SKIP); if [ "$result" = "AUTO_UPDATE_DISABLED" ]; then echo "debo: auto-update is not enabled. Suggest /debo:update-settings to the user."; else echo "debo: $result"; fi
